scripts.dev:backend: echo "Backend dev script removed. Use separate backend start if needed."
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-all.ps1 && npm run dev
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build:backend: echo "Python backend does not require a build step"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
